usa.title: Land of the Free
usa.text: The United States of America is a vast country known for its diverse culture, innovation, and iconic landmarks. From the bustling streets of New York City to the serene landscapes of Yellowstone National Park, the USA offers a wide range of experiences.

uk.title: Great Britain
uk.text: The United Kingdom, comprising England, Scotland, Wales, and Northern Ireland, has a rich history and cultural heritage. With landmarks like Big Ben, the Tower of London, and picturesque landscapes in Scotland, the UK is a blend of tradition and modernity.
